questionHtml: Deduce, with a reason, the position of the equilibrium.
markschemeHtml:
product/right/solution/NH4NO3 (aq) is favoured AND K>1 ✔

 

Accept K large.

Accept other valid ways of justifying equilibrium position such as ΔG<0/spontaneous/ΔH<0 AND ΔS>0.

meta.title: Deduce, with a reason, the position of the equilibrium.
